docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-26-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-26-2022 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF MARK KOLESNIKOV IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT UBER TECHNOLOGIES REPRESENTED BY CHIARRA DAVIS, PARALEGAL IS PRESENT. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. COURT MAKES DISCLOSURE OF DISQUALIFICATION. PARTIES AGREE TO WAIVE DISQUALIFICATION PURSUANT TO CCP 170.3(B)(1) AND WAIVER IS SIGNED BY ALL PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY KOLESNIKOV, MARK AS TO DEFENDANT UBER TECHNOLOGIES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-26-2022 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) CHIARRA DAVIS, ASSISTANT PARALEGAL FILED BY DEFENDANT UBER TECHNOLOGIES
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-26-2022 - JUDGMENT. PREVIOUSLY TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION ON 7-26-22.
WAIVER OF DISQUALIFICATION PURSUANT TO CCP 170.3(B)(1).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KOLESNIKOV, MARK IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT UBER TECHNOLOGIES THE COURT DOES NOT HAVE AUTHORITY TO ORDER UBER TO REINSTATE THE PLAINTIFF ON THEIR PLATFORM. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
